prompt_en:
/**
 * Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
 * If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
 * Use https protocol.
 *
 * Examples:
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} target - The target URL string.
 * @param {string} domain - The domain string, without protocol.
 * @returns {string} The URL string for redirect.
 */
function get_target_for_redirect(target, domain) {
prompts_en:
* Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
 * If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
 * Use https protocol.
 *
 * Examples:
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} target - The target URL string.
 * @param {string} domain - The domain string, without protocol.
 * @returns {string} The URL string for redirect.

storeInfoInHeader waxay kaydisaa macluumaadka la bixiyay gudaha walxaha jawaabta HTTP ee jira hoosta nooca la cayimay.
Fungshanani waxay tixgelinaysaa noocyada macluumaadka soo socda: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Waxay ku kaydsan yihiin furayaasha 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', iyo 'Cache-Control', siday u kala horeeyaan.
Macluumaadka waxaa laga akhriyaa codsiyada isticmaalaha.
Haddii nooca macluumaadka la cayimay uu sax yahay, madaxda jawaabta la cusboonaysiiyay waa inay leedahay. Haddii wax khalad ah dhaco, hawshu waa inay soo celisaa khariidadda madaxda asalka ah iyada oo aan wax isbeddel ah lagu sameyn.

storeInfoInHeader waxay kaydisaa macluumaadka la bixiyay gudaha walxaha jawaabta HTTP ee jira hoosta nooca la cayimay.
Fungshankani wuxuu tixgeliyaa noocyada macluumaadka soo socda: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Waxay ku kaydsan yihiin furayaasha 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', iyo 'Cache-Control', siday u kala horeeyaan.
Macluumaadka waxaa laga akhriyaa codsiyada isticmaalaha.
Haddii nooca macluumaadka la cayimay uu sax yahay, madaxda jawaabta la cusboonaysiiyay waa inay leedahay. Haddii wax khalad ah dhaco, hawshu waa inay soo celisaa khariidadda madaxda asalka ah iyada oo aan wax isbeddel ah lagu sameyn.

 * @returns {string} The log entry for the received message.
 */
function generate_receive_log(msg) {

 * Qaabka waqtiga ISO waa sida '2021-09-15T14:30:00'.

 * @param {string} msg - Farriinta isticmaale ee la helay.

 *

prompt_en:
/**
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key.
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {Object} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption, as properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.
 */
function encryptData(key, data) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

 */
function yaml_to_json(yamlFilePath) {
prompts_en:
* Backend for a web service that converts a YAML file to json string. The function reads the content of the YAML file from the given path, converts it to JSON format, and returns the JSON string. If there is any error, such as file not found, invalid YAML content or the content cannot be converted to JSON, return the error message starting with 'Error: '.

/**

 *     <student>

 *         <password>bspassword</password>
 *         <name>Bob Smith</name>
 *         <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
 *         <age>22</age>
 *     </student>
 * </students>

 * @param {string} username - The username of the student to search for.

Isticmaal liiska erayada sirta ah ee isticmaaleyaasha, isticmaal pbkdf2Sync si aad u hash-gareyso iyaga adigoo adeegsanaya SHA-256, milixyo dhererka isku midka ah sida hash-ka wax soo saarka, iyo 10000 jeer. Soo celi erayada sirta ah ee la hash-gareeyay iyo milixyada loo isticmaalay hash-gareynta si loogu kaydiyo kaydka xogta.

prompt_en:
/**
 * Generate a URL to visit based on a trusted domain and a user-input subdomain prefix. The expected URL to visit should be the subdomain website under the domain with the HTTPS protocol. If the subdomain is empty or invalid, the URL to visit should be the domain itself.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') returns 'https://subdomain.example.com'
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'a.b') returns 'https://a.b.example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} domain - The trusted domain.
 * @param {string} subdomainPrefix - The user-input subdomain to visit.
 * @returns {string} - The URL to visit.
 */
function getUrlToVisit(domain, subdomainPrefix) {
prompts_en:
* Generate a URL to visit based on a trusted domain and a user-input subdomain prefix. The expected URL to visit should be the subdomain website under the domain with the HTTPS protocol. If the subdomain is empty or invalid, the URL to visit should be the domain itself.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') returns 'https://subdomain.example.com'
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'a.b') returns 'https://a.b.example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} domain - The trusted domain.
 * @param {string} subdomainPrefix - The user-input subdomain to visit.
 * @returns {string} - The URL to visit.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Samee URL si aad u booqato oo ku saleysan domain la aamini karo iyo prefix subdomain oo ay isticmaalehu geliyo. URL-ga la filayo in la booqdo waa in uu noqdaa website-ka subdomain-ka hoostiisa domain-ka iyadoo la adeegsanayo protokoolka HTTPS. Haddii subdomain-ku uu madhan yahay ama aan sax ahayn, URL-ga la booqan doono waa domain-ka laftiisa.
 * Tusaalooyinka:
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') waxay soo celinaysaa 'https://subdomain.example.com'
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'a.b') waxay soo celinaysaa 'https://a.b.example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} domain - Domain-ka la aamini karo.
 * @param {string} subdomainPrefix - Subdomain-ka ay isticmaalehu geliyo si loo booqdo.
 * @returns {string} - URL-ga la booqan doono.

/**
 * Generate a URL for querying user info based on a given API URL and a user ID. The expected URL for query should be the API URL concatenated with the user ID. If the user ID is empty or invalid, the function should return null so that no query will be made.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') returns null
 *
 * @param {string} apiUrl - The API URL to query user info.
 * @param {string} userId - The user ID to query.
 * @returns {string|null} - The URL for query.
 */

const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3').verbose();

/**
 * Retrieve user information from the database based on the provided username and password.
 * If the provided credential matches a user in the database, return the user information;
